project.name: Camunda 7 to 8 Migration Tooling - Data - C8 Backend API
project.description: Version-agnostic SPI that every `c8-backend-*` implementation module fulfils. Kept free of `io.camunda.*` dependencies so it is safe for `core` (which is profile-pinned to a single C8 minor) to consume without dragging in a specific C8 version.
